I'm pleased to announce that Alex has joined our contract operations team. Alex will be helping us review vendor contracts to ensure compliance with our standard terms requirements.

Alex brings strong analytical capabilities and we're excited to have additional support on the team.

Patricia Huang

<email>
From: daniel.kim@legaledge.com

Subject: Welcome to LegalEdge!
Timestamp: 2025-11-19T17:15:22
Body: Alex,

Welcome to LegalEdge! We're glad to have you on the contract review team.

Contract review is important work — getting it right means the company is protected from unfavorable terms while vendors get onboarded smoothly. It's about reading each contract carefully and applying the standard terms requirements consistently.

Take your time getting familiar with our review policy and the different types of vendor contracts you'll encounter. The team is here to help as you ramp up.

Looking forward to working with you.

Daniel Kim
Senior Contract Analyst
LegalEdge Consulting, Boston MA
</email>
